title: Nexus PatchChapterRequest
description: Request body for PATCH /v1/local/works/{work_id}/chapters/{n} (V1.65 P0). All fields optional. `title` is rejected because it is display-only until P0 materializes a title column.

title.description: Rejected in V1.65 — display-only until a title column is materialized.

slug.description: URL-safe chapter slug. Changing a published chapter slug is blocked.

planned_word_count.description: Target word count for the chapter.

volume.description: Volume the chapter belongs to. Must preserve (work_id, volume, chapter) uniqueness.

status.description: Status transition. Only `not_started -> outlined` is allowed automatically; other transitions may require explicit confirmation in future iterations.

confirm_structural_edit.description: Must be true when mutating structure of a finalized chapter.

transition_reason.description: Required for explicit reverse/terminal transitions when implemented.
